info.name: UNLIMITEDHEALTHCARE API - Complete Collection
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for the UNLIMITEDHEALTHCARE backend system including all modules and endpoints (1-13 phases)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "City General Hospital",
  "type": "hospital",
  "description": "Full-service hospital with emergency care",
  "address": {
    "street": "123 Hospital Ave",
    "city": "New York",
    "state": "NY",
    "zipCode": "10001",
    "country": "USA"
  },
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "email": "info@citygeneral.com",
  "website": "https://citygeneral.com",
  "operatingHours": {
    "monday": "00:00-23:59",
    "tuesday": "00:00-23:59",
    "wednesday": "00:00-23:59",
    "thursday": "00:00-23:59",
    "friday": "00:00-23:59",
    "saturday": "00:00-23:59",
    "sunday": "00:00-23:59"
  }
}

{
  "patientId": "{{patient_id}}",
  "providerId": "{{provider_id}}",
  "centerId": "{{center_id}}",
  "appointmentDate": "2024-02-20T14:00:00Z",
  "duration": 30,
  "appointmentType": "consultation",
  "reason": "Follow-up for hypertension",
  "priority": "normal",
  "notes": "Patient requested afternoon appointment",
  "reminderPreferences": {
    "email": true,
    "sms": true,
    "reminderTime": 24
  }
}

{
  "completedBy": "{{provider_id}}",
  "completionDate": "2024-02-28T16:00:00Z",
  "outcome": "Patient evaluated, treatment plan established",
  "recommendations": "Continue current medication, follow up in 3 months",
  "followUpRequired": true,
  "reportBackToReferrer": true,
  "summary": "Comprehensive cardiac evaluation completed. Patient stable on current regimen."
}

{
  "patientId": "{{patient_id}}",
  "requestingCenterId": "{{center_id}}",
  "bloodType": "A+",
  "unitsNeeded": 3,
  "urgencyLevel": "urgent",
  "requiredBy": "2024-03-16T08:00:00Z",
  "reason": "Emergency surgery - blood loss",
  "requestingPhysician": "{{provider_id}}",
  "patientCondition": "stable but requires transfusion",
  "crossMatchRequired": true
}

{
  "status": "fulfilled",
  "unitsFulfilled": 3,
  "fulfilledBy": "{{center_id}}",
  "fulfilledDate": "2024-03-15T14:30:00Z",
  "notes": "Request fulfilled successfully, blood delivered to OR"
}

{
  "donorIds": ["{{donor_id}}"],
  "bloodTypes": ["A+", "O+"],
  "message": "Urgent need for blood donations. Your contribution can save lives!",
  "urgencyLevel": "high",
  "channels": ["email", "sms"],
  "scheduledFor": "2024-03-15T09:00:00Z"
}

formdata.value: Patient presenting with chest pain and shortness of breath

body.raw:
{
  "text": "Patient is a 45-year-old male presenting with chest pain and shortness of breath. History of hypertension. Physical exam reveals elevated blood pressure 150/95, heart rate 95 bpm. EKG shows normal sinus rhythm. Chest X-ray pending.",
  "processingType": "extract_entities",
  "extractionTargets": [
    "symptoms",
    "medical_history",
    "vital_signs",
    "medications",
    "procedures",
    "diagnoses"
  ],
  "language": "en",
  "confidenceThreshold": 0.8
}

formdata.value: Lab results from recent blood work
